conditions: at the moment the preparation of a product is started
after the preparation of a product is finished
if their requested time is not yet within ten minutes
so that i do not have to do that manually
so the customer has an insight into his order
so that a misunderstanding with the customer or a mistake from i can be resolved
so that the customer can make last-minute changes
so that the Ticket Master knows if the ticket master/she needs to hand the order directly to the customer or the delivery person
so that the kitchen knows when to start preparing a takeaway order
so that i do not have to walk physically to the kitchen
so that the delivery person knows where the delivery person needs to bring the order
so that the customer can be reached if there are problems with the order
so that i can customize the order for the customer.
